infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pinellas Run Club uses your camera so you can upload profile and feed photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pinellas Run Club uses your photo library so you can share run photos and update your profile.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pinellas Run Club uses your location to verify event check-ins when GPS check-in is enabled.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Pinellas Run Club uses your location to verify event check-ins when GPS check-in is enabled.

plugins.photosPermission: Pinellas Run Club uses your photo library so you can share run photos and update your profile.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pinellas Run Club uses your camera so you can upload profile and feed photos.
